name: Christmas Hazelnut Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the confectioner's sugar in a large bowl using a wooden spoon or your hands.
2. Refrigerate dough for 30 minutes.
3. Form dough into 1-1/4-inch balls and place them 1 inch apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
4. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 15-20 minutes, or until set but not brown. Do not overcook.
5. Let cool in the pan for a minute before removing to a wire rack. Cool until barely warm, then roll in sifted confectioner's sugar. Cool completely and roll again in confectioner's sugar just before serving.
Yield: about 20 balls. Make sure they are not too large or they will not cook properly.
